title: senecio decurrens
intro: Senecio decurrens, also known as the running fireweed, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. The leaves and flowers of Senecio decurrens have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is valued for its potential to alleviate health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. Senecio decurrens can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for a range of medicinal applications.
